methodology: Each skill tested against 10 real-world prompts. Score = correct outputs / total tests.

results.title: Advanced Tool Use
results.notes: Excellent guidance on tool composition; one edge case with parallel execution

results.title: Browser Automation
results.notes: Strong on Playwright patterns; occasionally misses edge cases with dynamic content

results.title: FastAPI CRUD
results.notes: Perfect score on API design, validation, error handling

results.title: UI Testing
results.notes: Good on visual assertions; sometimes over-complicates mobile testing

results.title: Pandas / Polars
results.notes: Strong on data transformation; occasionally misses memory optimization for large datasets

results.title: PostgreSQL Optimization
results.notes: Excellent on indexing and query plans; one edge case with composite keys

results.title: Kubernetes Architect
results.notes: Strong on manifests and scaling; occasionally under-specifies resource limits

results.title: DCF Model
results.notes: Excellent on financial projections; one edge case with negative cash flows

results.title: Stripe Integration
results.notes: Strong on webhook handling; occasionally misses PCI compliance edge cases

results.title: Commit Message Generator
results.notes: Excellent on conventional commits; one edge case with multi-line descriptions

results.title: SDR Research Brief
results.notes: Strong on firmographic research; occasionally verbose on smaller companies

results.title: GDPR Compliance
results.notes: Good on data protection frameworks; occasionally misses regional variations

results.title: SEO Audit
results.notes: Strong on on-page SEO; sometimes over-focuses on technical vs. content quality

results.title: Product Discovery
results.notes: Excellent on user research frameworks; one edge case with B2B discovery

results.title: ADR Writer
results.notes: Perfect on architecture decision templates; one edge case with legacy system decisions

results.title: Cold Email Sequence
results.notes: Strong on personalization; occasionally misses compliance with CAN-SPAM

results.title: Invoice Chaser
results.notes: Good on payment reminders; sometimes too aggressive in tone

results.title: Express Middleware
results.notes: Excellent on middleware patterns; one edge case with async error handling

results.title: Terraform Modules
results.notes: Strong on module design; occasionally misses state management best practices

results.title: SQL Optimization
results.notes: Excellent on query optimization; one edge case with complex CTEs
